Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Elizabeth asked[n]me to get a variety of drinks for her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I think I have everything now. I should[n]bring them to her before I forget...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This might be the vending machine that[n]was trending on the online forum...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apparently, you can still buy the[n]drinks that it says are sold out...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are {f 0 1 2}three types of drinks{f 0 1 27} that[n]are currently listed as "sold out"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I'll try buying something[n]even if it says it's sold out...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You can now buy more drinks at the vending machine in front of Iwatodai Station.[n]{f 1 1}
